overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing two characters riding a horse through an abandoned, overgrown urban industrial area during autumn. They travel under a large metal bridge, past abandoned vehicles, alongside brick warehouses with faded murals, and ascend a stone staircase through a brick archway into an upper courtyard.

events.description: entering the covered passage under the large industrial bridge
passing between concrete support pillars under the bridge

agents.ego_description: riding a horse forward through the covered industrial passage, navigating between concrete pillars and abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: large rusted metal bridge structure spanning overhead with concrete supports
rusted sedan covered in dust and vegetation
massive concrete pillars supporting the overhead bridge
metal fencing along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a third-person view of two characters on horseback approaching and entering a covered passage beneath a large industrial bridge. The environment is dimly lit with natural light filtering through, featuring concrete support pillars, chain-link fencing, and abandoned vehicles. The horse walks steadily forward through the gravel path under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban street with abandoned truck

events.description: exiting the covered bridge into open overgrown area with brighter lighting
passing abandoned box truck overgrown with grass on the left side

agents.ego_description: riding horse through the open grassy area, navigating around abandoned vehicles and overgrown vegetation

entered.detail: large white delivery truck abandoned on the grass with open cargo area
large red brick industrial building with faded painted mural on the side
trees with orange and red autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The horse emerges from under the bridge into a wide-open area with overgrown grass covering the ground. An abandoned box truck sits on the left, while a large brick warehouse building with a faded mural becomes visible ahead. The sky is overcast but much brighter than the covered passage, and autumn trees with colorful foliage line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: street alongside historic brick warehouse with mural

events.description: turning left to follow path alongside the large brick building
approaching stone staircase with brick archway visible ahead

agents.ego_description: riding alongside the brick warehouse building, approaching the stone staircase with archway

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward between brick walls
ornate brick archway with multiple arches at the top of the stairs
black vintage-style street lamp along the path

segments.scene_description: The horse rides alongside the large brick warehouse, revealing a detailed faded mural painted on its side. The path is paved with stone tiles and lined with street lamps. Ahead, a grand stone staircase with a brick archway structure becomes the focal point as the characters approach the elevated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase with brick archway leading to upper courtyard

events.description: horse begins ascending the wide stone staircase
passing through the brick archway into the upper courtyard

agents.ego_description: riding horse up the stone staircase, passing through the brick archway, and entering the upper plaza area with benches

entered.detail: open paved area with scattered benches and overgrown planters
wooden park benches with metal frames, overgrown with grass

segments.scene_description: The horse climbs the stone staircase between brick walls covered in ivy, passing through the ornate brick archway at the top. The scene transitions into an upper courtyard plaza with abandoned benches, street lamps, and overgrown vegetation. The camera continues forward through this elevated open area surrounded by industrial brick buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as two characters on horseback travel from a dim industrial underpass into a bright, elevated urban courtyard. It begins with the horse walking steadily through a covered passage beneath a large bridge, where concrete pillars and abandoned vehicles are shrouded in shadow. As the horse emerges from the overpass, the environment opens into a wide, overcast landscape of overgrown grass and autumn foliage, leading the camera toward a large brick warehouse adorned with a faded mural. The scene then shifts along a stone-tiled path lined with street lamps before turning toward a grand stone staircase. Finally, the horse climbs through an ornate brick archway draped in ivy, ascending into an upper courtyard plaza filled with abandoned benches and industrial brick buildings.
